zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Poley於1439年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可巴德利時，他的父親Simon Poley32歲，母親Margaret Alcokes27歲。他於1480年與Constance Gedding在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1487年在英國素福爾可巴德利享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Poley于1439年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可巴德利时，他的父亲Simon Poley32岁，母亲Margaret Alcokes27岁。他于1480年与Constance Gedding在英国英格兰素福爾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1487年在英国素福爾可巴德利享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Poley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Nord): from a variant of Polet, a vernacular pet form of the personal name Paul . This surname is very rare in France.
East German: habitational name from a place so named near Frankfurt on the Oder.

variants.name: Paul
meanings: English, French, German, Dutch, Swedish, West Indian (mainly Haiti, also e.g. Saint Lucia), and African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the personal name Paul (from Latin Paulus ‘small’), which has always been popular in Christendom. It was the name adopted by the Pharisee Saul of Tarsus after his conversion to Christianity on the road to Damascus in about AD 34. He was a most energetic missionary to the Gentiles in the Roman Empire, and played a very significant role in establishing Christianity as a major world religion. The name was borne also by numerous other early Christian saints. It is also occasionally borne by Jews; the reasons for this are not clear. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages and their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Greek Pavlis , Slovenian Pavel and Pavlič (see Pavlic ), Polish Paweł (see Pawel ) and Pawlicki , Assyrian/Chaldean Polous and Polus . In France, this surname is most common in Brittany (see 2 below).
Breton (mainly Finistère): from a Frenchified form of the personal name Paol, Breton form of Paul .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phóil ‘son of Paul’. Compare McFall .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Poley was born in 1439, in Badley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Simon Poley, was 32 and his mother, Margaret Alcokes, was 27. He married Constance Gedding in 1480, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1487, in Badley, Suffolk, England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Poley est né en 1439, à Badley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Simon Poley, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret Alcokes, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Constance Gedding en 1480, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1487, à Badley, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Poley 1439 in Badley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon Poley 32 und seine Mutter Margaret Alcokes 27. Er hat 1480 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Constance Gedding geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1487 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Badley, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Poley è nato il nel 1439 nel Badley, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Simon Poley, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Alcokes, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Constance Gedding nel 1480, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1487, nel Badley, Suffolk, England, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Poleyが1439年にイギリスイギリススフォルクバドリーで生まれた時，父Simon Poleyは32歳，母Margaret Alcokesは27歳であった。1480年にイギリスイギリススフォルクでConstance Geddingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1487年にイギリススフォルクバドリーで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Poley(이)가 1439년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 바들리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon Poley(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Alcokes(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Constance Gedding(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1487년 영국 수폴크 바들리에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Poley nasceu em 1439, em Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Simon Poley, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Alcokes, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Constance Gedding em 1480, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1487, em Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Poley родился в 1439 г. в местности бадли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Simon Poley было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Alcokes, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Constance Gedding в 1480 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1487 г. в местности бадли, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Poley nació en 1439, en Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Simon Poley, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Margaret Alcokes, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Constance Gedding en 1480, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1487, en Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años.
